reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the Declaration of Independence signer from the family descended from William, 4th Lord Livingston.
2. Determine which statesman from New York City matches that family member and return the name.
original_final_question: Who is descended from William, 4th Lord Livingston and was a statesman from New York City? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which Declaration of Independence signer is a member of the family descended from William, 4th Lord Livingston? Evidence: Livingston family: Descended from William, 4th Lord Livingston, its members included signers of the United States Declaration of Independence (Philip Livingston) and the United States Constitution (William Livingston). -> Philip Livingston

Node 2: Which statesman from New York City matches that Livingston family member? Evidence: Philip Livingston: Philip Livingston was an American merchant and statesman from New York City. -> Philip Livingston
